$schema: Captain runway state — read at every weekly review

burn.salary_note: Equity / sweat / Contribution Units phase. No cash salary.

runway.status_note: Graham's question: 'At your current rate of growth, can you make it to profitability before you run out of money?' Answer: no — MRR is $0, growth rate is undefined. Default-dead until first paying customer.

exit_to_default_alive.condition: MRR ≥ monthly_burn × 0.85, with 3+ paying customers and ≥3 months of consecutive positive net
exit_to_default_alive.estimated_path: 3 paying Hogwarts schools at $99-149/mo each = $300-450 MRR → 85% of $500 burn

alerts.trigger_at_6_months: Review burn cuts + accelerate Ali outreach + consider pricing experiment
alerts.trigger_at_3_months: Wartime CEO mode (Horowitz) — cut all non-pilot work, all hands on Hogwarts conversion
alerts.trigger_at_1_month: Either close a paying customer this month or pause the company
